name: THE EXECUTIVE BRIEF

sections.guidance: One sentence stating the finding with its number; this is the action title.
The single driver that explains most of the finding; name it, quantify it.
The chart(s) proving claim and cause; each with its QA checklist run.
The decision requested or taken, stated as a verb with a deadline.
One name accountable for the action; a team is not an owner.

example: Logistics drives two thirds of the overrun
Resequence deliveries to recover 8 points by Q3
qa: every chart passed its own QA
